name: crm_link_relationship
description: Create a directional edge between two contacts in the native CRM (Supabase contact_relationships table per Stack V4). Replaces the deprecated `ghl_link_contact` tool. Supports reports-to, colleague, referred-by, partner-of, and other relationship types. Self-relationships are rejected at the DB level.

from_contact_id.description: UUID of the source contact. REQUIRED.

to_contact_id.description: UUID of the target contact. REQUIRED. Must differ from from_contact_id.

strength.description: Strength of the relationship. Defaults to 'medium'.
